steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the exponential table
steps.content: Enter the table values as $x_1=[0,1,2]$ and $y_1=[867,870.47,873.95]$. Then type the exponential regression row $y_1 \sim a b^{x_1}$. Desmos returns $a=867$ and $b\approx 1.004$, so the graphable model is $y=867(1.004)^x$.

steps.title: Match the model to the choices
steps.content: The question uses $t$ and $n$ instead of $x$ and $y$, so $y=867(1.004)^x$ becomes $n=867(1.004)^t$. Since $1.004=1+0.004$, this is $n=867(1+0.004)^t$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
